rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) is unrelated to §11.1825, which governs exemptions for organizations constructing or rehabilitating low-income housing. The two provisions address different property types, taxpayers, and exemption mechanisms with no cross-reference or dependency.
quote: Sec. 11.1825. ORGANIZATIONS CONSTRUCTING OR REHABILITATING LOW-INCOME HOUSING: PROPERTY NOT PREVIOUSLY EXEMPT.
_note: No conflict. §11.1825 concerns low-income housing property exemptions for qualifying organizations; it does not reference or depend on the §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amount.
